title: Project 1: Expository Visualization
description: Looked at a variety of visualizations and determined which best represented the main takeaway from the data that I wanted to communicate.

title: Power Outage Analysis
description: Analyzed the causes of power outages and built a predictive model to predict durations of said power outages.

title: Portfolio Website Building
description: Built a website to showcase my projects, resume, contact information, and github.

title: NBA Payroll Analysis
description: Analyzed payroll data for the NBA

title: NFL Injury Analysis
description: Analyzed injury history for different players in the NFL to predict playing ability post injury

title: CRM Creation
description: Built a HubSpot CRM at my internship to track clients and leads more effectively
